title: dryas octopetala subsp. nervosa
intro: Dryas octopetala subsp. nervosa is a sub-species of the Dryas octopetala plant, commonly known as the mountain avens, a flowering plant native to mountainous regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dryas octopetala subsp. nervosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the flowers, leaves, and roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
